author: Idrees
description: Easily generate dynamic MOCs in your folder notes using waypoints. Enables folders to show up in the graph view and removes the need for messy tags!

manifest.author: Idrees Hassan
manifest.description: Easily generate dynamic content maps in your folder notes using waypoints. Enables folders to show up in the graph view and removes the need for messy tags!
manifest.name: Waypoint

name: Waypoint

releases.author: IdreesInc
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix bug with Title Property not working with folder notes by @byq77 in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/144
* Remove comment styling by @IdreesInc in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/147

## New Contributors
* @byq77 made their first contribution in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/144

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/compare/3.0.0...3.0.1

releases.author: IdreesInc
releases.description:
Bug fixes, get your bug fixes! And new bugs, I'm sure...
Mainly, fixed bases not being detected and merged a few PRs from some extremely patient contributors.

### Also I have a project discord now: https://discord.gg/6yxE9prcNc

## What's Changed
* Added Option to specify custom FolderNote Filename by @jyyyeung in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/82
* fix: Callout bug by @jace1427 in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/123
* feat: #25 add option 'Folders sorted to the top' by @Evilur in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/131
* fix: Fix locating parent point by @jamesbtan in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/119
* Support bases by @IdreesInc in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/138
* Check for ignored paths when scanning for waypoints by @IdreesInc in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/139

## New Contributors
* @jyyyeung made their first contribution in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/82
* @jace1427 made their first contribution in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/123
* @Evilur made their first contribution in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/131
* @jamesbtan made their first contribution in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/119

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/compare/2.1.0...3.0.0

releases.author: IdreesInc
releases.description:
This release includes bug fixes for the issue where wikilinks weren't being generated and empty ignore lists ignored everything. It also adds support for custom file titles using the "title" frontmatter property. Special thanks to @vburzynski and @tbdcit for their PRs!

## What's Changed
* Bug Fix - use wikilinks for folder note entries when option is enabled by @vburzynski in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/97
* Added basic support for titles defined in frontmatter by @tbdcit in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/96
* Fix empty regex being registered by settings by @IdreesInc in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/100

## New Contributors
* @tbdcit made their first contribution in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/96

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/compare/2.0.0...2.1.0

releases.author: IdreesInc
releases.description:
Thank you so much for your patience! I made Waypoint originally for my own use, and early on when I first released it I only had a few dozen other users. I did not realize how much it had grown since then! After discovering that the plugin now had over 30k downloads for some reason, I found that many wonderful developers had made contributions to this project. I've reviewed some of the biggest PRs and can now officially release version 2.0.0 of Waypoint! 

## Highlights

- Landmarks!
  - They're like waypoints, but parent waypoints will link _through_ them rather than stopping!
- Regex ignore lists!
  - Ignore files or folders with regular expressions!
- Spaces!
  - Indent with spaces with customizable indentation size!
- Callouts!
  - Add waypoints in callouts if that's your vibe with the syntax `> %% Waypoint %%`
- New command to find the parent waypoint!

## What's Changed
* Allow waypoints in callouts by @coanghel in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/85
* Add a new Command to Go to waypoint file  by @GYukai in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/84
  * Add command to locate the parent waypoint by @IdreesInc in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/86
* feat: :sparkles: Added Landmarks by @ironman820 in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/60
  * Add Landmarks by @IdreesInc in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/87
* Support for indenting with spaces by @vburzynski in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/61
  * Add option to indent with spaces for those terrible few by @IdreesInc in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/88

## New Contributors
* @coanghel made their first contribution in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/83
* @GYukai made their first contribution in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/84
* @ironman820 made their first contribution in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/60
* @vburzynski made their first contribution in https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/pull/61

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/compare/1.4.0...2.0.0

Thank you again to everyone who has contributed to this project! And if you ever want to get in touch with me or follow my socials for updates on this or other projects, [click here](https://github.com/IdreesInc)!

releases.author: IdreesInc
releases.description:
- Fix markdown link generation
- Add support for folder notes that are outside of the target folder
- Hide enclosing folder note in generated waypoint by default (configurable in settings)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/IdreesInc/Waypoint/compare/1.2.0...1.3.0
